mapper.update: update knowledge_document_version set parse_status = 'PARSE_CHUNKED', chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, token_count = #{tokenCount}, parser_name = #{parserName} where id = #{versionId} and deleted = 0
update knowledge_document_version set parse_status = 'PARSE_CHUNKING' where id = #{versionId} and deleted = 0
update knowledge_document_version set parse_status = 'PROCESS_FAILED' where id = #{versionId} and deleted = 0
